description_long: This motorcycle features a classic, somewhat boxy design with a deep red fuel tank and seat cowl, accented by black and metallic gray components. The frame and engine are exposed, with visible wear and weathering on the metal surfaces, suggesting frequent use or age. The wheels are spoked and fitted with thick, treaded tires, while the front and rear fenders are angular and utilitarian. The handlebars are straight and slightly raised, equipped with standard controls and mirrors. A rectangular headlight and a rear license plate are present, along with a prominent exhaust pipe running along the right side. The overall appearance is utilitarian, with a rugged, urban-ready aesthetic.
description: A weathered, red and black motorcycle with a boxy frame, spoked wheels, and a prominent exhaust pipe, showing signs of age and urban use.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length, red fuel tank, black seat, and large exhaust pipe on the right.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the rectangular headlight, straight handlebars, and front wheel.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the left profile, spoked wheels, and exposed engine details.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the license plate, taillight, and the end of the exhaust pipe.
